summary: Iteration 60: Bug Fixes and 4 New Country Templates - All features verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: Both bugfixes verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Template keyword matching for 'New Zealand PR' falls back to AI because 'pr' alone doesn't match 'skilled migrant' keywords. Use 'New Zealand Skilled Migrant' for template match.
XCircle delete button only appears for docs with source='cm_request' - admin-default docs cannot be removed by CM (by design)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified: (1) BUGFIX: Admin save workflow step now works after AI suggest - NaN duration_days sanitized, regex escaping fixed in products.py, (2) BUGFIX: CM can delete CM-added docs via XCircle button - 3 delete buttons found in test case, (3) ENHANCEMENT: 8 templates now available (4 new: nz_skilled_migrant with NZD fees, usa_h1b with USD fees, uae_golden_visa with AED fees, singapore_ep with SGD fees). All AI suggest endpoints return source='template' for matching products.

nz_skilled_migrant_template.details: NZ template exists with NZD $3,310 fees, immigration.govt.nz URL

usa_h1b_template.details: USA H-1B template exists with USD $460+ fees, uscis.gov URL

uae_golden_visa_template.details: UAE Golden Visa template exists with AED 2,800 fees, u.ae URL

singapore_ep_template.details: Singapore EP template exists with SGD $105 fees, mom.gov.sg URL

ai_suggest_usa_h1b.details: AI suggest for USA H-1B returns source='template' with LCA docs

ai_suggest_uae_golden_visa.details: AI suggest for UAE Golden Visa returns source='template' with passport docs

ai_suggest_singapore_ep.details: AI suggest for Singapore EP returns source='template'

ai_suggest_nz_skilled_migrant.details: AI suggest for 'New Zealand Skilled Migrant' returns source='template' with NZD fees

admin_save_step_null_duration.details: Saving workflow step with null duration_days works (NaN fix verified)

admin_save_step_empty_docs_filtered.details: Empty doc_names are filtered when saving workflow step

regex_escaping_special_chars.details: Step names with special regex chars (brackets, plus, asterisk) work correctly

admin_workflow_step_save_ui.details: Admin can edit step, click AI Suggest, and save - toast shows 'Workflow step updated!'

cm_xcircle_delete_button_ui.details: CM case detail shows 3 XCircle delete buttons for CM-added docs, AI Suggest button, Add Doc button, Customization Enabled badge

admin_workflow_step_save.edit_workflow_dialog: Opens with AI Auto-Fill Docs button, Add Step button, 4 workflow steps
admin_workflow_step_save.step_editor_dialog: Opens with Step Name, Step Order, Description, Duration, Document Requirements
admin_workflow_step_save.ai_suggest_button: Visible in step editor with sparkles icon
admin_workflow_step_save.save_button: Update Step button at bottom of dialog
admin_workflow_step_save.save_result: Toast shows 'Workflow step updated!' - BUGFIX VERIFIED

cm_case_detail.xcircle_delete_buttons: 3 XCircle buttons found for CM-added docs (e.g., TEST_CM_Doc_e66e9f)
cm_case_detail.ai_suggest_button: 1 AI Suggest button visible in unlocked step
cm_case_detail.add_doc_button: 1 +Add Doc button visible in unlocked step
cm_case_detail.workflow_steps: Shows Integration Test Step (In Progress), ECA (Pending), IELTS/CELPIP/PTE CORE (Pending)

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
